introductionSomali: Unit-kan waxaad ku baranaysaa xubnaha qoyska, sida qoys tusaale ah looga hadlo, have/has, lahaanshaha, muuqaalka, dabeecadda iyo sida qof loo soo bandhigo si xushmad leh.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar magacyada xubnaha qoyska iyo xiriirka qof kasta, adigoo xusuusanaya in qoysasku qaabab kala duwan yeelan karaan.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Qoyskaygu wuxuu ku nool yahay Soomaaliya.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Family waa dadka qoys ahaan isku xiran.
Father waa waalidka labka ah.
Mother waa waalidka dheddigga ah.
Parents waa father iyo mother ama dadka ku koriya.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Parent waa hal waalid; parents waa laba ama ka badan.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Son waa wiilka uu qof waalid u yahay.
Daughter waa gabadha uu qof waalid u yahay.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waxaan leeyahay hal walaal oo lab ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Brother waa walaal lab.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waxay leedahay laba walaalo oo dhedig ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Sister waa walaal dhedig.
Husband waa ninka xaas leh.
Wife waa haweeneyda xaas ah.
Child waa hal ilmo.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Plural-ka child waa children, ma aha childs.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Children waa wax ka badan hal child.
Grandfather waa aabbaha aabbaha ama hooyada.
Grandmother waa hooyada aabbaha ama hooyada.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Awoowahayaga iyo ayeeyadayadu meel dhow ayay deggan yihiin.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Grandparents waa awoowe iyo ayeeyo.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: My uncle works in a shop.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Adeerkay ama abtigey wuxuu ka shaqeeyaa dukaan.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Uncle wuxuu noqon karaa walaalka aabbaha ama hooyada.
Aunt waxay noqon kartaa walaasha aabbaha ama hooyada.
Cousin waa ilmaha uncle ama aunt.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Wiilka walaalkay ama walaashay waa shan jir.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Nephew waa wiilka uu dhalay walaalka ama walaasha.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Gabadha walaalkay ama walaashay waa ardayad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Niece waa gabadha uu dhalay walaalka ama walaasha.

examples.somali: Awoowahay iyo ayeeyaday meel dhow ayay deggan yihiin.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.english: Yusuf and Maryan are the parents.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.english: Ali is their son and Amina is their daughter.
lines.somali: Ali waa wiilkooda, Amina-na waa gabadhooda.

practiceExercises.question: “Family” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Family waxaa loola jeedaa Qoys.

practiceExercises.question: My mother and father are my ___.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “parents” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Father” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Father macnihiisu waa Aabbe.

practiceExercises.question: Hal ilmo waxaa la yiraahdaa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “child”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: sister / is / my / This
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “This is my sister.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: My father is a teacher.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaan leeyahay hal walaal dhedig.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “I have one sister.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Magacow ugu yaraan toban xubnood oo qoys, kadib sharax family tree male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Samee family tree fudud oo Yusuf iyo Maryan waalid yihiin; ku dar son, daughter iyo grandparents.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Magacow ugu yaraan toban xubnood oo qoys, kadib sharax family tree male-awaal ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Samee family tree fudud oo Yusuf iyo Maryan waalid yihiin; ku dar son, daughter iyo grandparents.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay xubnaha qoyska. Parent waa hal waalid, parents waa badan; child waa hal ilmo, children-na waa carruur.

quizQuestions.question: “Family” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Family waxaa loola jeedaa Qoys.

quizQuestions.question: My mother and father are my ___.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “parents” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Father” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Father macnihiisu waa Aabbe.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sida qoys tusaale ah looga hadlo adigoon bixin xogtaada gaarka ah.
learningObjectives: Sheeg tirada dadka qoys tusaale ah.
Weydii brothers, sisters iyo qofka lala nool yahay.
Sheeg shaqo fudud oo waalid tusaale ahi qabto.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Small family waa qoys xubnihiisu tiro yar yihiin.
Large family waa qoys xubno badan leh.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waxaan u wada nool nahay si wadajir ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Together wuxuu muujinayaa in dadku meel ama hawl wadaagaan.
Live with waxaa lagu sheegaa qofka aad la nooshahay.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: There are five people in the family.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Qoyska waxaa ku jira shan qof.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: People waa plural-ka caadiga ah ee person.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina uses teacher in a short conversation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Amina waxay Macallin ku isticmaashaa wada sheekeysi gaaban.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Teacher waa qof wax bara.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: My mother works at a hospital.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Hospital waa goob caafimaad.
Su’aashan waxay weydiinaysaa dadka kula nool.

grammar.explanationSomali: How many wuxuu weydiiyaa tiro. Who wuxuu weydiiyaa qof. What does ... do? wuxuu weydiiyaa shaqo.
grammar.rule: How many + plural noun; Who + do/does; What + does + person + do?

positiveExamples.english: My mother works at a hospital.
There are five people in my family.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoyskayga waxaa ku jira shan qof.

questionExamples.english: How many people are in your family?
questionExamples.somali: Immisa qof ayaa qoyskaaga ku jira?

questionExamples.english: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
questionExamples.somali: Ma leedahay walaalo lab ama dhedig?

commonMistakesSomali: How many waxaa la socda people, ma aha person marka tiro badan la weydiinayo.
Xog male-awaal ah ayaad isticmaali kartaa.

examples.english: My mother works at a hospital.
There are five people in my family.
examples.somali: Qoyskayga waxaa ku jira shan qof.

dialogues.titleSomali: Laba arday oo qoys tusaale ah ka hadlaya

lines.speaker: Hodan
lines.english: How many people are in your example family?
lines.somali: Immisa qof ayaa ku jira qoyskaaga tusaalaha ah?

lines.speaker: Samir
lines.somali: Haa, waxaan leeyahay laba walaalo lab.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.english: Who do you live with in this example?

practiceExercises.question: “Small family” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Small family waxaa loola jeedaa Qoys yar.

practiceExercises.question: There are five ___ in my family.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “people” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Large family” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Large family macnihiisu waa Qoys weyn.

practiceExercises.question: Su’aashee ayaa qofka aad la nooshahay weydiinaysa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “Who do you live with?”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: with / parents / live / my / I
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “I live with my parents.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I have a small family.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaan leeyahay laba walaalo lab.
options: There are five people in my family.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “I have two brothers.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Ka hadal qoys male-awaal ah: tirada dadka, brothers/sisters, shaqooyinka iyo cidda wada nool.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor shan jumladood oo qoys tusaale ah ku saabsan. Ha isticmaalin xog xasaasi ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Ka hadal qoys male-awaal ah: tirada dadka, brothers/sisters, shaqooyinka iyo cidda wada nool.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor shan jumladood oo qoys tusaale ah ku saabsan. Ha isticmaalin xog xasaasi ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay inaad qoys tusaale ah ku sharaxdo I have…, There are… iyo I live with….

quizQuestions.question: “Small family” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Small family waxaa loola jeedaa Qoys yar.

quizQuestions.question: There are five ___ in my family.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “people” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Large family” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Large family macnihiisu waa Qoys weyn.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar have/has, negative forms iyo do/does questions ee lahaanshaha.
learningObjectives: Have iyo has ku waafaji subject-ka.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Have waxaa lala isticmaalaa I, you, we iyo they.
Has waxaa lala isticmaalaa he, she iyo it.
Do wuxuu su’aal la sameeyaa I/you/we/they.
Does wuxuu su’aal la sameeyaa he/she/it.
Don't waa do not oo la soo gaabiyey.
Doesn't waa does not oo la soo gaabiyey.
One waxaa lala isticmaalaa magac singular ah.
Any wuxuu inta badan yimaadaa su’aal ama negative.

grammar.explanationSomali: Have waxaa lala isticmaalaa I, you, we, they. Has waxaa lala isticmaalaa he, she, it. Marka does ama doesn’t jiro, falka wuxuu noqdaa have.
grammar.rule: I/you/we/they have; he/she/it has; do/does + subject + have

questionExamples.english: How many sisters does he have?
questionExamples.somali: Immisa walaalo dhedig ah ayuu leeyahay?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran Does she has…; qaabka saxda ahi waa Does she have….
He have waa khalad; he has ayaa sax ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.somali: Haa, waxaan leeyahay hal walaal dhedig.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: No, she does not have children.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.english: Say: Does he have a brother?
lines.somali: Dheh: Does he have a brother?

practiceExercises.question: “Have” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Have waxaa loola jeedaa Lahow/hayso.

practiceExercises.question: She ___ three brothers.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Has” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Has macnihiisu waa Leeyahay/leedahay.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa sax ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “Does she have a sister?”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: have / children / They / two
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “They have two children.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I have a brother.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaad leedahay qoys weyn.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “You have a large family.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Samee lix jumladood: I/you/we/they have iyo he/she has; kadib laba su’aalood oo do/does ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor lix jumladood oo have/has leh, laba negative iyo laba question.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee lix jumladood: I/you/we/they have iyo he/she has; kadib laba su’aalood oo do/does ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor lix jumladood oo have/has leh, laba negative iyo laba question.
lessons.summarySomali: Have: I/you/we/they. Has: he/she/it. Does iyo doesn’t ka dib mar walba have ayaa yimaada.

quizQuestions.question: “Have” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Have waxaa loola jeedaa Lahow/hayso.

quizQuestions.question: She ___ three brothers.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Has” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Has macnihiisu waa Leeyahay/leedahay.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar my, your, his, her, its, our iyo their iyo pronoun-ka ay la xiriiraan.
learningObjectives: Pronoun kasta la xiriiri possessive adjective-kiisa.
Lahaansho ku muuji magaca ka hor.
Kala saar he/his, she/her, we/our iyo they/their.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: My wuxuu muujinayaa wax aniga iga tirsan.
Your wuxuu muujinayaa wax adiga kaa tirsan.
His waxaa lala xiriiriyaa he.
Her waxaa lala xiriiriyaa she.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The cat is with its family.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Its waxaa loo adeegsadaa shay ama xayawaan.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha ku darin apostrophe; it's waxay ka dhigan tahay it is.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Our waxaa lala xiriiriyaa we.
Their waxaa lala xiriiriyaa they.

grammar.explanationSomali: Possessive adjective wuxuu yimaadaa magaca ka hor: my father, her mother. Jadwalku waa I→my, you→your, he→his, she→her, it→its, we→our, they→their.
commonMistakesSomali: He father waa khalad; his father ayaa sax ah.
She mother waa khalad; her mother ayaa sax ah.
Its waa lahaansho; it's waa it is.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: She is Amina. Her mother is a nurse.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: He is Ali. His father is a teacher.

practiceExercises.question: “My” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: My waxaa loola jeedaa Kayga/tayda.

practiceExercises.question: Amina is a student. ___ mother is a nurse.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Her” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Your” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Your macnihiisu waa Kaaga/taada.

practiceExercises.question: We → kee?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “our”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: family / Our / small / is
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Our family is small.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: My father is kind.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Walaashaa waa ardayad.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Your sister is a student.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Ku sheeg tusaalooyin my, your, his, her, its, our iyo their; qof iyo qoys male-awaal ah isticmaal.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor toddoba jumladood, mid kasta oo isticmaala possessive adjective kala duwan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Ku sheeg tusaalooyin my, your, his, her, its, our iyo their; qof iyo qoys male-awaal ah isticmaal.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor toddoba jumladood, mid kasta oo isticmaala possessive adjective kala duwan.
lessons.summarySomali: I→my, you→your, he→his, she→her, it→its, we→our, they→their. Eraygu magaca ayuu ka horreeyaa.

quizQuestions.question: “My” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: My waxaa loola jeedaa Kayga/tayda.

quizQuestions.question: Amina is a student. ___ mother is a nurse.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “Her” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Your” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Your macnihiisu waa Kaaga/taada.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sharaxaad muuqaal oo fudud, sax ah oo ixtiraam leh.
learningObjectives: Qof si ixtiraam leh u sharax.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Tall wuxuu tilmaamaa dhererka qofka.
Short halkan wuxuu tilmaamayaa dherer gaaban.
Young wuxuu tilmaamaa qof da’ yar.
Old halkan wuxuu si xushmad leh u tilmaamaa da’ weyn.
Thin waa sharaxaad muuqaal; si ixtiraam leh u isticmaal.
Strong wuxuu tilmaamaa xoog.
Beautiful waa sharaxaad wanaagsan.
Handsome badanaa waxaa lagu tilmaamaa nin ama wiil.
Hair waxaa lala isticmaalaa has marka la sheegayo waxa qof leeyahay.
Short hair waa timo aan dheerayn.
Midabka hair wuxuu yimaadaa hair ka hor.
Eyes waa plural, laakiin lahaanshaha waxaa xukuma subject-ka: she has.
Big wuxuu tilmaamaa cabbir weyn.
Small wuxuu tilmaamaa cabbir yar.

grammar.explanationSomali: Dherer, da’ iyo sifo guud waxaa lagu sheegaa be: He is tall. Hair iyo eyes waxaa lagu sheegaa have/has: She has brown eyes.
grammar.rule: Subject + be + adjective; subject + have/has + feature
grammar.sentenceStructure: He/She + is + adjective OR has + noun phrase
commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran He has tall; dheh He is tall.
Ha oran She is brown eyes; dheh She has brown eyes.
Sharaxaadda qofka si ixtiraam leh u isticmaal.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: He is tall and he has short hair.
lines.somali: Wuu dheer yahay, wuxuuna leeyahay timo gaaban.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Describe the woman in the example.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: She has long hair and brown eyes.
lines.somali: Waxay leedahay timo dheer iyo indho bunni ah.

practiceExercises.question: “Tall” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Tall waxaa loola jeedaa Dheer.

practiceExercises.question: She ___ brown eyes.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Short” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Short macnihiisu waa Gaaban.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa sax ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “He is tall.”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: hair / has / black / She
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “She has black hair.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: He is tall.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Way gaaban tahay.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “She is short.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Sharax qof male-awaal ah adigoo isticmaalaya tall/short, young/old, hair iyo eyes.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor shan jumladood oo muuqaal qof tusaale ah si ixtiraam leh u sharaxaya.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Sharax qof male-awaal ah adigoo isticmaalaya tall/short, young/old, hair iyo eyes.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor shan jumladood oo muuqaal qof tusaale ah si ixtiraam leh u sharaxaya.
lessons.summarySomali: Isticmaal is + adjective: He is tall. Isticmaal has + feature: He has black hair.

quizQuestions.question: “Tall” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Tall waxaa loola jeedaa Dheer.

quizQuestions.question: She ___ brown eyes.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Short” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Short macnihiisu waa Gaaban.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sifooyin wanaagsan oo dabeecadda qofka lagu tilmaamo, kana sooc muuqaalka.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Wuxuu u muuqdaa qof naxariis badan.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Kind wuxuu tilmaamaa qof dadka si wanaagsan ula dhaqma.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aad bay saaxiibtinimo badan u tahay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Friendly waa qof si wanaagsan dadka ula macaamila.
Helpful waa qof dadka caawiya.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina uses happy in a short conversation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Amina waxay Faraxsan ku isticmaashaa wada sheekeysi gaaban.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Happy wuxuu tilmaamaa dareen farxad.
Quiet waa qof ama meel aan buuq badnayn.
Funny waa qof dadka ka qosliya.
Polite wuxuu tilmaamaa edeb iyo ixtiraam.
Honest waa qof run iyo daacadnimo leh.
Hard-working wuxuu tilmaamaa qof dadaal badan.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Ardayga cusub waa xishood badan yahay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Shy waa qof ka xishooda la hadalka dadka qaarkood.
Clever wuxuu tilmaamaa qof si fiican wax u fahma.
Patient halkan waa adjective micnihiisuna yahay dulqaad badan.

grammar.explanationSomali: Adjective wuxuu iman karaa be ka dib: She is friendly; ama magaca ka hor: a friendly teacher. Tall waa muuqaal; kind waa dabeecad.

positiveExamples.somali: Aad bay saaxiibtinimo badan u tahay.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha ku darin -s adjective-ka marka subject-ku he/she yahay.
Muuqaal iyo dabeecad ha isku khaldin.

examples.somali: Aad bay saaxiibtinimo badan u tahay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What is your example friend like?
lines.somali: Saaxiibkaaga tusaalaha ahi dabeecad ahaan waa sidee?

lines.speaker: B
lines.somali: Waa saaxiibtinimo iyo caawimo badan tahay.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.somali: Haa, sidoo kale waa edeb badan yahay.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.somali: Wuxuu u muuqdaa qof naxariis badan.

practiceExercises.question: “Kind” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kind waxaa loola jeedaa Naxariis badan.

practiceExercises.question: Our teacher is very ___. She waits calmly.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “patient” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Friendly” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Friendly macnihiisu waa Saaxiibtinimo badan.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa dabeecad tilmaamaya?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “friendly”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: helpful / friend / is / My
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “My friend is helpful.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: My mother is kind.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Saaxiibkay waa caawimo badan yahay.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “My friend is helpful.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Sharax dabeecadda saaxiib, macallin ama qof male-awaal ah adigoo isticmaalaya afar adjective.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor lix jumladood oo personality adjectives leh; laba ka mid ah adjective + noun ha noqdaan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Sharax dabeecadda saaxiib, macallin ama qof male-awaal ah adigoo isticmaalaya afar adjective.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor lix jumladood oo personality adjectives leh; laba ka mid ah adjective + noun ha noqdaan.
lessons.summarySomali: Personality waa dabeecad; appearance waa muuqaal. Qaabka fudud waa Subject + be + adjective.

quizQuestions.question: “Kind” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Kind waxaa loola jeedaa Naxariis badan.

quizQuestions.question: Our teacher is very ___. She waits calmly.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “patient” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Friendly” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Friendly macnihiisu waa Saaxiibtinimo badan.

lessons.titleSomali: Isticmaalka This, That, These iyo Those
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar tilmaamidda qof ama dad dhow iyo fog, singular iyo plural.
learningObjectives: Dhow iyo fog si sax ah u kala saar.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: This waxaa loo adeegsadaa hal qof ama shay oo dhow.
That waxaa loo adeegsadaa hal qof ama shay oo fog.
These waxaa loo adeegsadaa dad ama waxyaabo badan oo dhow.
Those waxaa loo adeegsadaa dad ama waxyaabo badan oo fog.
Near wuxuu tilmaamaa meel dhow.
Far wuxuu tilmaamaa meel fog.
Su’aashan waxaa la weydiiyaa qof keliya oo dhow.
Are waxaa lala isticmaalaa those iyo people.

grammar.explanationSomali: This: hal dhow. That: hal fog. These: badan oo dhow. Those: badan oo fog. This/that waxaa la socda is; these/those waxaa la socda are.
commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran These is; dheh These are.
Ha oran Those is; dheh Those are.
This iyo these waa dhow; that iyo those waa fog.

practiceExercises.question: “This” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: This waxaa loola jeedaa Kani/tani (dhow, hal).

practiceExercises.question: ___ are my friends here beside me.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “These” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “That” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: That macnihiisu waa Kaas/taasi (fog, hal).

practiceExercises.question: Dad badan oo fog waxaa lagu tilmaamaa…
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “those”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: cousins / Those / my / are
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Those are my cousins.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: This is my brother.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Kaas waa macallinkay.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “That is my teacher.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Adeegso this, that, these iyo those adigoo afar scenario oo dad dhow/fog ah sharaxaya.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor siddeed jumladood: laba this, laba that, laba these iyo laba those.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Adeegso this, that, these iyo those adigoo afar scenario oo dad dhow/fog ah sharaxaya.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor siddeed jumladood: laba this, laba that, laba these iyo laba those.
lessons.summarySomali: This/that waa singular; these/those waa plural. This/these waa dhow; that/those waa fog.

quizQuestions.question: “This” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: This waxaa loola jeedaa Kani/tani (dhow, hal).

quizQuestions.question: ___ are my friends here beside me.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “These” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “That” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: That macnihiisu waa Kaas/taasi (fog, hal).

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar su’aalo fudud oo aqoonsiga, xiriirka, dabeecadda, muuqaalka, da’da iyo meesha qofku deggan yahay.
learningObjectives: Dabeecad iyo muuqaal si kala duwan u weydii.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Who wuxuu weydiinayaa aqoonsiga qofka.
She waa qof dhedig ah.
They waa dad badan.
Is + he wuxuu sameeyaa su’aal yes/no ah.
Are waxaa lala isticmaalaa they.
Su’aashani badanaa waxay weydiinaysaa dabeecadda.
Su’aashani waxay weydiinaysaa muuqaalka.
How old wuxuu weydiinayaa da’da.
Where wuxuu weydiinayaa meel.
People waxaa lala isticmaalaa are.

grammar.explanationSomali: Who is/are wuxuu weydiiyaa qofka. What is ... like? wuxuu weydiiyaa dabeecadda. What does ... look like? wuxuu weydiiyaa muuqaalka.
grammar.rule: Who + is/are; What + is/does; How old + is; Where + does + live
commonMistakesSomali: What is he like? iyo What does he look like? isku macne ma aha.
Where does she lives? waa khalad; dheh Where does she live?

lines.speaker: B
lines.somali: Waa naxariis iyo dulqaad badan tahay.

lines.speaker: Colleague
lines.somali: Waa qofka cusub ee nala shaqeeya.

lines.speaker: Colleague
lines.english: He is tall and has short hair.
lines.somali: Wuu dheer yahay, timo gaabanna wuu leeyahay.

practiceExercises.question: “Who is he?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Who is he? waxaa loola jeedaa Isagu waa kuma?.

practiceExercises.question: What does she ___ like?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “look” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Who is she?” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Who is she? macnihiisu waa Iyadu waa kuma?.

practiceExercises.question: Su’aashee ayaa dabeecadda weydiinaysa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “What is he like?”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: they / Who / are
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Who are they?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: Who is he?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Iyadu waa kuma?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Who is she?”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Sawir ama scenario male-awaal ah ka weydii who, personality, appearance, age iyo place.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor siddeed su’aalood oo dadka ku saabsan, kadib jawaabo gaaban ku dar.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Sawir ama scenario male-awaal ah ka weydii who, personality, appearance, age iyo place.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor siddeed su’aalood oo dadka ku saabsan, kadib jawaabo gaaban ku dar.
lessons.summarySomali: Who wuxuu weydiiyaa qofka; What is ... like? dabeecad; What does ... look like? muuqaal.

quizQuestions.question: “Who is he?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Who is he? waxaa loola jeedaa Isagu waa kuma?.

quizQuestions.question: What does she ___ like?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “look” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Who is she?” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Who is she? macnihiisu waa Iyadu waa kuma?.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isku dar family, age, occupation, personality, appearance iyo place si qof loogu soo bandhigo 5–7 jumladood.
learningObjectives: Qof si xushmad leh u soo bandhig.
Family member, friend, teacher ama coworker sharax.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: This is waxaa lagu bilaabaa soo bandhigid qof dhow.
Meet waxaa lagu casuumaa qof inuu qof kale barto.
Student waa qof wax barta.
Friend waa qof aad saaxiib tihiin.
Teacher waa qof wax bara.
Coworker waa qof isku goob ama shaqo ka wada shaqaysaan.
Lives waxaa lala isticmaalaa he ama she.
Works waxaa lala isticmaalaa he ama she.

grammar.explanationSomali: Ku bilow This is…, kadib isticmaal he/she is da’da, shaqada iyo sifooyinka; has muuqaalka; lives meesha.
grammar.rule: This is + person. He/She is… Has… Lives…
grammar.sentenceStructure: Introduction + age + role + personality + appearance + place

positiveExamples.somali: Waxay jirtaa siddeed iyo toban sano.
Waa saaxiibtinimo iyo caawimo badan tahay.
Waxay leedahay timo madow oo dheer.

commonMistakesSomali: Magaca qofka ka dib pronoun isku mid ah sii wad.
Ha gelin xog xasaasi ah; qof male-awaal ah isticmaal.

examples.somali: Waxay jirtaa siddeed iyo toban sano.
Waa saaxiibtinimo iyo caawimo badan tahay.
Waxay leedahay timo madow oo dheer.

lines.speaker: Hani
lines.somali: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Amina
lines.somali: Waa saaxiibtinimo iyo caawimo badan tahay.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.somali: La kulan qofka nala shaqeeya, Ali.

lines.speaker: Worker
lines.english: He works in the office and he is very polite.
lines.somali: Wuxuu ka shaqeeyaa xafiiska, waana edeb badan yahay.

lines.speaker: Guest
lines.somali: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo, Ali.

practiceExercises.question: “This is…” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: This is… waxaa loola jeedaa Kani/tani waa….

practiceExercises.question: She ___ long black hair.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Meet” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Meet macnihiisu waa La kulan/baro.

practiceExercises.question: Jumladda ugu fiican ee soo bandhigiddu waa tee?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “This is my sister, Amina.”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: friendly / is / helpful / She / and
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “She is friendly and helpful.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: This is my sister, Amina.
options: Waxay leedahay timo madow oo dheer.
Waxay jirtaa siddeed iyo toban sano.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxay jirtaa siddeed iyo toban sano.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “She is eighteen years old.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Soo bandhig family member, friend, teacher ama coworker male-awaal ah 5–7 jumladood.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor paragraph 5–7 jumladood ah oo qof tusaale ah soo bandhigaya: xiriir, da’, shaqo, dabeecad, muuqaal iyo magaalo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Soo bandhig family member, friend, teacher ama coworker male-awaal ah 5–7 jumladood.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor paragraph 5–7 jumladood ah oo qof tusaale ah soo bandhigaya: xiriir, da’, shaqo, dabeecad, muuqaal iyo magaalo.
lessons.summarySomali: Soo bandhigid wanaagsan waxay leedahay This is…, kadib is/has/lives oo 5–7 jumladood gaaban ah.

quizQuestions.question: “This is…” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: This is… waxaa loola jeedaa Kani/tani waa….

quizQuestions.question: She ___ long black hair.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Meet” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Meet macnihiisu waa La kulan/baro.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib u eeg family vocabulary, have/has, possessives, appearance, personality, demonstratives iyo sharaxaadda qof.
learningObjectives: Aqoonso oo sax khaladaadka caadiga ah.
Qof male-awaal ah si buuxda u sharax.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Family member waa qof qoyska ka tirsan.
Doorashadu waxay ku xiran tahay subject-ka.
Wuxuu yimaadaa magaca ka hor.
Appearance waa sida qofku u muuqdo.
Personality waa sida qofku dabeecad ahaan yahay.
Near wuxuu la xiriiraa this iyo these.
Far wuxuu la xiriiraa that iyo those.
Introduce waa qof kale barid.
Describe waa bixinta faahfaahin.

examples.somali: Wuxuu leeyahay timo madow oo gaaban.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do you have a large family?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: No, I have a small family.

lines.speaker: B
lines.somali: Waxay leedahay timo madow oo dheer.

practiceExercises.question: “Family member” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Family member waxaa loola jeedaa Xubin qoys.

practiceExercises.question: He ___ one sister.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Have or has” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Have or has macnihiisu waa Lahow: have ama has.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa sax ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa “Those are my cousins.”. Xulashooyinka kale kuma waafaqsana subject-ka ama tirada.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: patient / teacher / Our / is
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Our teacher is patient.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: I have two brothers.
options: Wuxuu leeyahay timo madow oo gaaban.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Hooyadeed waa naxariis badan tahay.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Her mother is kind.”.

practiceExercises.question: Layliga qoyska iyo dadka waxaa lagu samayn karaa qof ama qoys male-awaal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Xog dhab ah looma baahna; tusaale male-awaal ah ayaa ku filan.

practiceExercises.question: Dib u sheeg family members, kadib qof tusaale ah ku sharax family relation, appearance iyo personality.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, isticmaal jumlado gaaban oo ixtiraam leh.

practiceExercises.question: Qor paragraph dib-u-eegis ah oo leh have/has, possessive adjective iyo this/that/these/those.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi subject-ka, verb-ka iyo calaamadda dhammaadka jumlad kasta.

practiceExercises.question: Children waa plural-ka eraygee?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hal waa child; wax ka badan hal waa children.

practiceExercises.question: She ___ two brothers.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: She waxaa la socda has.

practiceExercises.question: Does he ___ a sister?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Does ka dib waxaa yimaada have, ma aha has.

practiceExercises.question: Amina is a student. ___ mother is a nurse.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Amina waa she; possessive adjective-keedu waa her.

practiceExercises.question: Kee ayaa tilmaamaya dabeecad?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kind waa dabeecad; kuwa kale waa muuqaal.

practiceExercises.question: ___ are my cousins over there.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Dad badan oo fog waxaa lagu tilmaamaa those.

practiceExercises.question: Su’aashee ayaa weydiinaysa muuqaalka?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: What does ... look like? wuxuu weydiiyaa muuqaalka.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel: “Kani waa walaalkay.”
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qof keliya oo dhow: This is my brother.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: “Our teacher is patient.”
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Our waa “-kayaga/-keenna”, patient-na waa dulqaad badan.

practiceExercises.question: Qor 5–7 jumladood oo qof male-awaal ah ku soo bandhigaya: xiriirka, da’da tusaalaha ah, shaqada, muuqaalka iyo dabeecadda.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal this is, he/she is, has iyo possessive adjective ku habboon.

lessons.speakingPractice: Dib u sheeg family members, kadib qof tusaale ah ku sharax family relation, appearance iyo personality.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor paragraph dib-u-eegis ah oo leh have/has, possessive adjective iyo this/that/these/those.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad dib u eegtay qoyska, lahaanshaha, muuqaalka, dabeecadda, tilmaamayaasha iyo su’aalaha dadka.

quizQuestions.question: “Family member” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Family member waxaa loola jeedaa Xubin qoys.

quizQuestions.question: He ___ one sister.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “has” ayaa jumladda ka dhigaya mid sax ah.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Have or has” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Have or has macnihiisu waa Lahow: have ama has.

unitQuiz.question: “Niece” waa tee?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Niece waa gabadha uu dhalay walaalka ama walaasha.

unitQuiz.question: Plural-ka child waa…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Child waa singular; children waa plural.

unitQuiz.question: Father iyo mother wadajir waa…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Father iyo mother waa parents.

unitQuiz.question: “Husband” lidka xiriirka guurka waa…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Husband iyo wife waa labada eray ee xiriirka guurka.

unitQuiz.question: Ilmaha uncle ama aunt waa…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Cousin waa ilmaha uncle ama aunt.

unitQuiz.question: I ___ two brothers.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: I waxaa la socda have.

unitQuiz.question: She ___ one sister.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: She waxaa la socda has.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa sax ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Does ka dib have ayaa yimaada.

unitQuiz.question: They ___ have a large family.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: They waxaa la socda don't.

unitQuiz.question: He ___ have a brother.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: He waxaa la socda doesn't; ka dibna have.

unitQuiz.question: I have a sister. ___ name is Hani.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Sister waa she; lahaanshaheedu waa her.

unitQuiz.question: We → possessive adjective kee?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: We waxaa lahaansho ahaan u dhigma our.

unitQuiz.question: Ali has a brother. ___ brother is tall.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Ali waa he; possessive adjective-ku waa his.

unitQuiz.question: They → possessive adjective kee?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: They waxaa lahaansho ahaan u dhigma their.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa muuqaal tilmaamaya?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Brown eyes waa muuqaal; kuwa kale waa dabeecad.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa dabeecad tilmaamaya?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Friendly waa personality adjective.

unitQuiz.question: He ___ tall.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Tall waa adjective; He is tall.

unitQuiz.question: She ___ long hair.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Hair waa feature uu qof leeyahay; She has long hair.

unitQuiz.question: ___ is my brother here beside me.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Hal qof oo dhow waxaa lagu tilmaamaa this.

unitQuiz.question: ___ are my cousins over there.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Dad badan oo fog waxaa lagu tilmaamaa those.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa sax ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: These waa plural, waxaana la socda are.

unitQuiz.question: A: What is Hani like? B: She is kind and helpful. Maxaa laga hadlayaa?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: What is ... like? wuxuu weydiiyaa dabeecadda.

unitQuiz.question: A: Who are those people? B: They are my cousins. Dadkaasi waa ayo?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Jawaabtu si cad ayay u sheegaysaa “They are my cousins.”

unitQuiz.question: U beddel: “Waxay leedahay laba walaalo dhedig.”
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: She waxaa la socda has; sisters waa plural.

unitQuiz.question: U beddel: “Kuwaas waa saaxiibbaday.”
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Dad badan oo fog: Those are my friends.
